layer3_inference: Operators may be preparing isolation valve pre-staging or cross-sector feed activation as contingency actions not visible in telemetry
rejection_reason: FLAGGED classification (2 assumptions) plus zero data support. Stripped per burden of proof Step 2. Layer 3 itself rated this low confidence. The inference is pure speculation from rational behavior — plausible but entirely unsupported. Per LZ-RC-003, absence of evidence of preparation is not evidence of preparation, and Layer 3 correctly cited this law but then proceeded to build an inference on it anyway.
